$comment: Golden contract fixture for GET /api/health (mt#2629). Single shared location consumed by BOTH sides of the tray/cockpit supervision split: src/cockpit/health-contract.test.ts (bun) asserts the LIVE server response's field set + types match `fields` below; cockpit-tray/src-tauri/src/supervisor.rs's `health_contract` test module (cargo) asserts these fields — plus the literal TS source of health.ts — still name the fields the Rust supervisor parses (`rustConsumedFields`). See contract/README.md for the full contract note, including the port/process-detection semantics documented alongside this fixture.
